title: Documentation: Fix typos and standardize terminology in markdown files
body:
### Description:
Several typographical errors and inconsistent terminology have been identified in the project documentation files. These minor errors affect the professionalism and clarity of the documentation.

### Files and errors identified:

1. Downloads.md

- Incorrect: where as

- Correct: whereas (conjunction expressing contrast)

2. RELEASE.md

- Incorrect: abbrieviated

- Correct: abbreviated

3. ISSUE.md

- Incorrect: repoducer (2 instances)

- Correct: reproducer

- Inconsistent: UT

- Standard: UTC (Coordinated Universal Time)
